title: Playground
description: A clean scratch App for poking at the workspace — files, terminal, and sandbox.

onboarding.title: Welcome to the Playground
onboarding.intro: A clean scratch space to poke at files, the terminal, and the sandbox.

points.title: Work with files
points.body: Create and edit files in the workspace on the left.

points.title: Run things
points.body: Open the terminal or ask the agent to run code in the sandbox.

points.title: Experiment freely
points.body: Nothing here is precious — try things out.

suggestions.label: List files
suggestions.prompt: List the files in the workspace.

suggestions.label: Working dir
suggestions.prompt: Run `pwd` and show me the working directory.

suggestions.label: Hello, Python
suggestions.prompt: Write and run a short Python script that prints a greeting.
